9.21. In relation to proceedings set out in column 1 of the following table, column 2 sets out who the respondents to those proceedings will be.


Textual Amendments


F66 Words in rule 9.21 table omitted (22.4.2014) by virtue of The Family Procedure (Amendment No.3) Rules 2013 (S.I. 2013/3204) , rules 1 , 30 (with rule 137 ); S.I. 2014/954 , art. 2


Marginal Citations


M16 Section 20A was inserted by section 33(1) of and paragraph 69 of Schedule 2 to the Family Law Reform Act 1987 and substituted by section 108(5) of and paragraph 39 of Schedule 13 to the Children Act 1989.


### [ F67 Duty to make entries in the court’s register E+W


9.21A. Where a court officer receives notice of any direction made in the High Court or family court under section 28 of the 1978 Act by virtue of which an order made under that Act or the 2004 Act ceases to have effect, particulars of the direction must be noted in the court’s records. ]


Textual Amendments


F67 Rule 9.21A inserted (22.4.2014) by The Family Procedure (Amendment No. 2) Rules 2014 (S.I. 2014/667) , rules 1 , 10 (with rule 45 )


### [ F68 Chapter 5A ] E+W Certain applications


Textual Amendments


F68 Pt. 9 Ch. 5A cross-heading inserted (22.4.2014) by The Family Procedure (Amendment No. 2) Rules 2014 (S.I. 2014/667) , rules 1 , 11 (with rule 45 )
